mapper.select: select * from aiw_user_risk_profile where user_biz_id = #{userBizId} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into aiw_user_risk_profile (biz_id, user_biz_id, kyc_status, risk_level, assessment_version, assessed_at, kyc_reviewed_at, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) values (#{bizId}, #{userBizId}, #{kycStatus}, #{riskLevel}, #{assessmentVersion}, #{assessedAt}, #{kycReviewedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}) on duplicate key update kyc_status = values(kyc_status), risk_level = values(risk_level), assessment_version = values(assessment_version), assessed_at = values(assessed_at), kyc_reviewed_at = values(kyc_reviewed_at), updated_at = values(updated_at), is_deleted = values(is_deleted)
mapper.update: update aiw_user_risk_profile set is_deleted = 1 where user_biz_id = #{userBizId}
